PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.enabl: Enable the client-side PF2e airspace visuals and tactical HUD.
Make the full ApplicationV2 airspace HUD available from Token controls. It remains closed until clicked, opens fully expanded, and closes on every Scene change.
Mark Foundry's actual Token footprint with a non-interactive four-arc landing ring that strengthens on hover or selection.
Use a compact relative-height axis in the full HUD; exact elevation remains visible on every Token. Disable for a compact Token list.
Render a concentric transparent flight-plate rim, refractive highlights, and the circular end of the camera-aligned support rod.
Project the acrylic rod and the Token's real texture silhouette toward the upper-right, with distance growing linearly from zero elevation.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.stand: Adjust the top-down acrylic rim, rod end, and interaction X-ray opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Adjust the maximum opacity of the simulated height shadow.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.proje: Adjust the original-footprint landing ring and interaction reticle opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Scale the elevation-linear visual projection distance without changing rules distance.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.title: PF2e Airspace
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.noNearbyAi: No visible airborne Token is within the visual {radius}-grid radius.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.empty: No visible Tokens match this filter.
